name: Maya Chen
communication_style: Direct and unfiltered. Calls out greenwashing immediately. Uses current slang, skeptical of polished marketing. Will Google a brand's ethics mid-conversation.
background: Recent college grad, barista part-time, passionate environmental activist. Reads ingredient labels and supply chain disclosures.

name: Robert Hendricks
communication_style: Deliberate and measured. References his past purchasing decisions as benchmarks. Skeptical of anything that 'hasn't been around long enough to prove itself.' Speaks in full sentences.
background: Retired engineer, homeowner, golfs on weekends. Brand loyalty built over decades. Trusts Consumer Reports over social media reviews.

name: Destiny Williams
communication_style: Warm but incisive. Consistently asks 'who is this really built for?' and 'who benefits from this?' Draws on personal experience as a woman of color navigating consumer spaces.
background: Non-profit program manager, single parent, urban renter. Hyper-attuned to whether brands actually reflect the communities they claim to serve.

name: Tyler Kowalski
communication_style: Blunt and transactional. Immediately anchors everything to price vs. what he already has. Dismisses 'lifestyle' framing. Asks 'but does it actually work better than what I have?'
background: HVAC technician, two kids in high school, coaches little league. Fixes things himself. Major skeptic of subscription models.

name: Priya Patel
communication_style: Data-driven and ROI-focused. Asks about integrations, scalability, and user reviews on G2 or Reddit. Willing to pay premium for genuine quality but will demolish vague value props.
background: Product manager at a SaaS startup, early adopter, reads TechCrunch daily. Buys tools that make her look smart and save her time.

name: Frank Delgado
communication_style: Guarded and slow to warm up. Instinctively pushes back on price. Respects craftsmanship and durability over brand prestige. Has been burned by 'the next big thing' before.
background: Long-haul truck driver, union member, pays cash when he can. Owns things for 15 years. Deeply suspicious of anything requiring an app or monthly fee.

name: Sofia Andersen
communication_style: Enthusiastic and trend-aware. Evaluates products partly on 'is this Instagrammable?' and 'would I post this?' Moved by community buzz and influencer credibility, not corporate ads.
background: Freelance graphic designer, active on TikTok and Instagram. Discovered most of her favorite brands through creator content. Experiences FOMO acutely.

name: Margaret O'Brien
communication_style: Thoughtful and research-oriented. Questions health and safety implications before anything else. Wants to know who stands behind the product — credentials matter. Dislikes pushy sales tactics.
background: Retired nurse practitioner, book club organizer, volunteers at local food bank. Reads medical journals recreationally. Trusts peer recommendations from people she respects over ads.
